title: The Umbrageous Umbrella-maker
content:
The Umbrageous Umbrella-maker,
    whose Face nobody ever saw, because it was
    always covered by his Umbrella.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "The Umbrageous Umbrella-maker"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
